query:
SELECT g.id, g.name, g.min_required, g.max_allowed, g.is_required, i.name as item_name 
FROM menu_addon_groups g 
JOIN menu_items i ON g.menu_item_id = i.id 
WHERE (g.name LIKE '%Varie%' OR g.name LIKE '%Carne%' OR g.name LIKE '%Mix%' OR g.name LIKE '%Prefer%' OR g.name LIKE '%Alterar%')
ORDER BY i.name, g.display_order
LIMIT 30;
